title: Admin Adding and Removing Guests from Boards

posts.author: Jorgen (Jorgen )
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way of adding and removing users from boards directly from the admin profile view.

Within the profile view we can see which shareable boards particular guest is assigned too.

From here can we add and remove boards.

Otherwise, we are going to multiple boards to change different guests.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jorgen !

Welcome to the community! Right now in monday.com you can go into the Admin profile view and deactivate the user. This will not “remove” them from the boards that they are assigned to, but it will stop the user from having access. To add someone to monday.com board what I might suggest is leveraging the “board ownership” tab in the Users Menu (Admin Panel) to add someone to all of the boards on monday.com that are assigned to someone else.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: NoyNoy (Noy Malka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !
We’ve developed an app called VisionControl that solves this exact issue!
With VisionControl, you can add multiple users to multiple boards in one click, manage permissions easily, and save valuable time.
